blended.narrative: Winter Park is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 45°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 5" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 2.8" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 8" over the past week. Current depth: 39".
